title: 4G 64G for Ford Focus Exi MT 2 3 Mk2/Mk3 2004-2011 Android Car Stereo with Wireless Carplay, 9 Inch Touch Screen Car Radio with GPS Bluetooth FM RDS DSP WiFi Android Auto + AHD Backup Camera
features: 【8 core Android Touchscreen Stereo for Ford Focus】Compatible Vehicles: for Ford Focus Exi MT 2 3 Mk2/Mk3 2004-2011. Designed and Contoured to Match Factory Dashboard, Factory Style Texture Design, 9'' 2.5D Tempered Glass Mirror auto radio player. RAM 4G + ROM 64G memory, High definition 1080P, full capacitance touch screen for easy operation, well designed user interface for car only. Support split screen.

【Wireless Carplay/Wireless Android auto/Mirror Link】 You can choose wired connection or wireless connection to carplay or andriod auto, connect to mobile phone, access mobile phone address book, mail, notification, map navigation, music, video and other information, and realize voice control.

【GPS Navigation/WiFi/DSP】 built-in GPS Navigation, you can download offline maps, with wifi, you can perfectly use apps store,allows you to use any application such as online Maps, YouTube, TikTok, Spotify, etc. Built-in DSP, Enhance your sound quality with digital signal processing, which reduces noise, distortion, and interference.

【Bluetooth & FM/RDS Radio】stereo with bluetooth, connect to your phone via Bluetooth for hands-free answering and making calls, playing music intelligently. with FM radio, 18 preset stations, you can listen to real-time traffic, news broadcasts, weather forecasts etc.

【Rear View Camera】Android Car stereo with backup camera, with easy installation and operation rear-view camera, when the vehicle shifts into reverse，the car stereo screen will automatically display the reverse image and record the traffic, make your daily reversing safer and more convenient.
